summary: Large partial decompilation of sysdolphin baselib cobj: most of asm/sysdolphin/baselib/cobj.s was removed and cobj.c gained C implementations, declarations, struct refinements, and some remaining inline asm for hard-to-match camera math paths. The PR also adjusted GX/VI and caller headers to support the CObj work, notably changing GXSetProjection to take Mtx44 and adding VIGetNextField. The PR body specifically notes a tools/frank.py patch needed for HSD_CObjGetViewingMtxPtr.
what_changed: Deleted almost all of asm/sysdolphin/baselib/cobj.s, leaving the file at only its include/section stub while moving substantial CObj logic into src/sysdolphin/baselib/cobj.c.

Added C implementations or prototypes for many CObj APIs, including HSD_CObjAddAnim, HSD_CObjAnim, HSD_CObjReqAnim, makeProjectionMtx, HSD_CObjSetupViewingMtx, HSD_CObjSetCurrent, HSD_CObjGetViewingMtxPtr, HSD_CObjGetInvViewingMtxPtr, projection getters/setters, viewport/scissor helpers, flag helpers, HSD_CObjInit, and HSD_CObjLoadDesc.

Kept some functions as inline asm or asm blocks in cobj.c, including setupNormalCamera/setupTopHalfCamera/setupBottomHalfCamera and vector/roll-related routines, reflecting that this was a partial match rather than a complete clean-C decompilation.

Refined HSD_CObj layout in cobj.h: grouped viewport fields into struct Viewport, grouped scissor fields into struct Scissor, renamed eye_position to eyepos, and corrected projection spelling from FRUSTRUM/frustrum to FRUSTUM/frustum.
Expanded cobj.h declarations from loose/unknown prototypes to typed signatures using HSD_CObj*, Vec3*, Mtx, MtxPtr, struct Viewport, and struct Scissor.
Changed GXSetProjection from f32* indexing to Mtx44 indexing in GXTransform.c/.h so projection matrices are passed with their true 4x4 matrix type.
Added VIGetNextField declaration to dolphin/vi/vi.h for camera viewport jitter paths.
Updated lbVector_WorldToScreen to read cobj->viewport.left/top/right/bottom instead of flat viewport_left/right/top/bottom fields.
Removed a stale extern declaration of HSD_CObjGetInvViewingMtxPtr from ftdrawcommon.c after cobj.h gained the proper declaration.
Patched tools/frank.py instruction-reordering logic by decoding RT/RA fields and blocking one lwz/addi epilogue reorder case; PR body says this was needed for HSD_CObjGetViewingMtxPtr.
smart_moves: The PR did not force every hard camera function into C at once; it moved matchable CObj pieces into C while preserving asm blocks for remaining fragile math/codegen cases.
Structuring viewport and scissor as nested structs improved layout readability while preserving offsets, making later CObj/camera work less error-prone.
Changing GXSetProjection to Mtx44 avoided misleading flattened f32* indexing and matched how CObj projection matrix builders naturally produce matrices.
Adding precise prototypes reduced duplicate externs and made call sites such as ftdrawcommon.c and lbvector.c depend on the shared cobj.h contract.
The frank.py fix targeted instruction decoding rather than a one-off symbol hack, making the tool less likely to perform an invalid epilogue reorder in similar cases.
decomp_lessons: For large baselib modules, a partial decomp can still remove most standalone asm by mixing matched C, inline asm islands, and improved headers.
Camera/object structs should reflect semantic sub-objects when offsets permit it: nested Viewport and Scissor fields made downstream uses clearer without changing layout intent.
Correct spelling matters for future searchability and consistency: this PR standardized FRUSTUM/frustum instead of the prior FRUSTRUM/frustrum spelling.
When decompiling matrix-heavy code, update supporting library prototypes to the real matrix type; otherwise callers are forced into artificial flattened indexing.
If a match depends on tool behavior, document and patch the tool in the same PR so future matching work is reproducible.
naming_conventions: CObj public APIs use the HSD_CObj prefix, e.g. HSD_CObjGetViewingMtxPtr, HSD_CObjSetProjectionType, HSD_CObjSetViewportfx4.
Internal helpers use CObj-prefixed or lower-case helper names, e.g. CObjUpdateFunc, CObjInit, CObjLoad, makeProjectionMtx, setupNormalCamera.
Projection constants use PROJ_PERSPECTIVE, PROJ_FRUSTUM, and PROJ_ORTHO.
Nested layout fields use semantic lower-case names: cobj->viewport.left/right/top/bottom and cobj->scissor.left/right/top/bottom.
The eye position WObj field was named eyepos in HSD_CObj, matching added assertions such as cobj->eyepos.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used inline asm in cobj.c for functions that were not yet cleanly matched, while still eliminating the bulk external assembly file.
Used extern float/double constants such as HSD_CObj_804DE478, HSD_CObj_804DE47C, HSD_CObj_804DE480, and related CObj constants to preserve expected sdata references.
Retained assertion string/data symbols such as cobj.c and cobj to match HSD assertion behavior and line-numbered asserts.
Patched frank.py to decode PowerPC instruction fields with int.from_bytes and RT/RA helpers, then prevented a problematic lwz/addi swap when the lwz uses r1 and the addi has nonzero RA.
The PR body directly identifies HSD_CObjGetViewingMtxPtr as the function that required the frank tooling patch.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR slice.
The only human text beyond the title was the author note: "Patch to frank needed for HSD_CObjGetViewingMtxPtr".
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that fully matched remaining asm functions in src/sysdolphin/baselib/cobj.c, especially setupNormalCamera, setupTopHalfCamera, setupBottomHalfCamera, roll2upvec, HSD_CObjGetUpVector, and HSD_CObjSetRoll.
Search for later cleanups that rename or further validate HSD_CObj fields viewport, scissor, eyepos, and frustum.
Search for later changes to tools/frank.py epilogue reorder logic to see whether this HSD_CObjGetViewingMtxPtr fix generalized or was replaced.
Check whether GXSetProjection(Mtx44, s32) affected other matrix callers beyond cobj.
